hooks.command: LOCK="/tmp/wslcb-submodule-update-$(date +%Y%m%d)"; if [ ! -f "$LOCK" ]; then git submodule update --remote --merge skills-vendor/gregoryfoster-skills skills-vendor/obra-superpowers && touch "$LOCK" && if ! git diff --quiet HEAD skills-vendor/gregoryfoster-skills skills-vendor/obra-superpowers 2>/dev/null; then git add skills-vendor/gregoryfoster-skills skills-vendor/obra-superpowers && git commit -m 'chore: update skills submodules'; fi; fi
